title: Vorrec
bodyText:
Old dwarf cleric who attended Sellie's fatal delivery and told Root both mother and daughter died — "birth went wrong, twisted magic involved, bodies burned, no viewing" ([[roots-journal]]).

> [!dm] Except Eira lived. Vorrec either lied, was deceived, or did something. He's the loose thread on which the whole Darkpass family truth hangs — and nobody has thought to find him yet.
